_metadata.description: Controlled vocabulary for the 6 product-quality verdicts shipped to Flutter (SAFE, CAUTION, POOR, BLOCKED, UNSAFE, NUTRITION_ONLY). Carries the full display contract per second-opinion review 2026-04-30: name + short_label + tone + ui_color + ui_icon + action live in this vocab so Flutter is a renderer (no presentation logic in Dart). Single source of truth for verdict labels across verdict_badge, alert_summary_card, banner, and score_breakdown_card. Bundled as a Flutter asset.
_metadata.purpose: Display contract for the canonical 6 shipped verdicts emitted by score_supplements.py / build_final_db.py and consumed by Flutter. Each entry carries the locked name/short_label/tone/ui_color/ui_icon/action — Flutter renders verbatim, no inference. Verdict precedence (BLOCKED > UNSAFE > CAUTION > POOR > SAFE) lives in scoring_config.json; NUTRITION_ONLY is a food-shape export verdict.
_metadata.alignment: Pipeline source: scripts/score_supplements.py _derive_verdict() (BLOCKED via B0 banned/recalled gate; UNSAFE via critical-flag escalation; CAUTION/POOR via quality-score thresholds; SAFE default). Flutter consumer: lib/features/product_detail/widgets/verdict_badge.dart (replaces hardcoded switch).

field_contract.id: Stable uppercase identifier emitted by the scoring engine. Never rename without a pipeline + Flutter + cached-blob migration.
field_contract.name: Full user-facing label (sentence case). Shown in detail screens and full-text contexts.
field_contract.short_label: Compact chip / pill label. ≤12 chars. Shown in search-result tiles and dense list views.
field_contract.tone: Semantic intent for theming. One of: positive, neutral, info, warning, danger.
field_contract.ui_color: Color hint Flutter resolves to a theme color. One of: green, blue, gray, yellow, orange, red.
field_contract.ui_icon: Icon hint Flutter resolves to an icon asset. One of: check, info, warning, alert, block.
field_contract.action: Suggested user action verb-phrase (≤40 chars). Shown beneath the verdict in product detail.
field_contract.notes: ≤200-char plain-English description shown in tap-to-learn modal.

_metadata.pipeline_contract_note: Per REFERENCE_DATA_LOOKUP_OPPORTUNITIES.md §1: NOT_SCORED is intentionally NOT in vocab — products that fail scoring divert to the review queue and never ship to Flutter. NUTRITION_ONLY is intentionally included because food-shape products ship with ingredient-focused display rather than bioactive scoring.

verdicts.name: Safe
verdicts.notes: Product passed all safety gates and meets the quality threshold. Use as directed on the label and follow your healthcare provider's guidance.

verdicts.name: Caution
verdicts.notes: Product has flags worth reviewing before use — possible interactions, dose concerns, or quality issues. Read the warnings and check with your provider.

verdicts.name: Poor quality
verdicts.notes: Product is safe to use but scored low for ingredient quality, dosing, or evidence backing. Consider higher-quality alternatives in the same category.

verdicts.name: Do not use
verdicts.notes: Product contains a banned, recalled, or otherwise prohibited substance. Do not use. Consult your provider or pharmacist if you have already been taking it.

verdicts.name: Unsafe
verdicts.notes: Product has critical safety flags (high-dose contraindications, severe interaction risk, or regulatory adverse events). Do not use without medical supervision.

verdicts.name: Food product — see ingredients
verdicts.notes: Food-shape product where supplement-style scoring does not apply. Review the ingredients, nutrition facts, allergens, and label claims.
